---
name: Documentation request
about: Request a documentation improvement
title: "docs: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Documentation area

Which document, section, command, template, or workflow needs improvement?

## Current gap

What is missing, unclear, outdated, or risky?

## Suggested change

Describe the desired documentation update.

## Validation

How should reviewers confirm the documentation is correct?

## Safety notes

Do not include `.env`, tokens, credentials, private keys, personal data, or internal `.sdd-master/` content from consumer projects.
